title: galinsoga quadriradiata var. hispida
intro: Galinsoga quadriradiata var. hispida, also known as prickly gallant soldier or prickly galinsoga, is a variety of the Galinsoga quadriradiata species, a flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Galinsoga quadriradiata var. hispida include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be consumed fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
